mizzen.d: n. fore-and-aft sail set on the mizzenmast

mizzenmast.d:
n. The hindmost mast of a three-masted vessel, or of a
   yawl-rigged vessel.

mizzini's test.t: [医] 马济尼氏试验(梅毒絮凝试验)

mizzle.t:
n. 蒙蒙雨, 细雨
vi. 下蒙蒙雨, 逃亡, 抱怨
mizzle.d:
n very light rain; stronger than mist but less than a shower
v rain lightly

mizzled.t: v. 下蒙蒙细雨( mizzle的过去式和过去分词 )

mizzles.t: v. 下蒙蒙细雨( mizzle的第三人称单数 )
mizzles.d:
n very light rain; stronger than mist but less than a shower
v rain lightly

mizzling.t: v. 下蒙蒙细雨( mizzle的现在分词 )
mizzling.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Mizzle
